activities_projects.title: Land Use Map Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify different types of land use in your area
steps: Take a blank map of your area
Mark areas used for agriculture, forests, settlements, and industries
Use different colors for each type of land use
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about how humans use land for various purposes

activities_projects.title: Natural Resource Collage
activities_projects.objective: Recognize different natural resources and their uses
steps: Collect pictures representing water, forests, minerals, and soil
Create a collage on the A3 sheet
Label each resource and mention one use
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of natural resources
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and correctness of information (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Daily Life and Environment Chart
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how environment influences human activities
steps: Draw columns for food, clothing, housing, and occupation
Write examples of each based on your region
Indicate how environment affects these choices
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the link between environment and human life

activities_projects.title: Water Conservation Poster
steps: Research simple water conservation methods
Create a poster showing methods like rainwater harvesting, reusing water
Include a short description or slogan
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness of water conservation

activities_projects.title: Resource Usage Survey
activities_projects.objective: Understand how people use local resources
steps: Prepare 5–6 questions on use of water, electricity, forest produce, and transport
Interview family members or neighbors
Record and summarize the results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand human dependence on local resources
activities_projects.evaluation: Survey completeness and clarity of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Traditional vs Modern Housing Drawing
activities_projects.objective: Compare housing styles influenced by environment
steps: Draw one traditional house and one modern house from your region
Label features such as materials used and design
Write two lines explaining why environment influenced each style
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students appreciate how environment shapes human settlements
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of drawing and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Field Visit Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe human-environment interaction in your locality
steps: Visit a nearby farm, forest, or water body
Observe how people use and manage natural resources
Write 5–6 observations in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect classroom concepts to real-life observations
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and detail of observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Story Writing: Life Around Natural Resources
activities_projects.objective: Understand human dependence on environment through creative writing
steps: Imagine a day in a village near a river or forest
Write a short story highlighting how people get food, water, and fuel
Include challenges and solutions related to resources
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand resource dependence through imagination
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and relevance to chapter concepts (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Environment Vocabulary Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Reinforce key terms from the chapter
steps: List 10 key terms such as agriculture, irrigation, deforestation, renewable
Create a crossword or word search puzzle
Exchange puzzles with classmates to solve
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen vocabulary related to human-environment interactions

activities_projects.title: Mini Quiz on Human-Environment Interactions
steps: Prepare 10 simple questions from the chapter
Ask classmates to answer them
Keep score for correct answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students reinforce knowledge through peer learning
